headline: Is Aon Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Aon has underperformed the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, but Wall Street analysts remain cautiously optimistic about the company’s long-term growth outlook.

headline: Is Aon (AON) Now Attractive After A 15% One Year Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Aon's current share price gives you good value or not, you are in the right place for a clear look at what the numbers are saying. The stock last closed at US$339.07, with a recent 7 day return of 6.2%, a 30 day return showing a 3.0% decline, a year to date return showing a 1.5% decline, and a 1 year return showing a 15.5% decline, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 15.2% and 52.4% respectively. Recent coverage around Aon has focused on its position in...

headline: Assessing Aon (AON) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Performance
summary: Event context and recent share performance Aon (AON) has come into focus for investors after a period of mixed share performance, with a small gain over the past week but declines over the month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Aon. Stepping back, Aon’s recent 7 day share price return of 6.18% sits against a year to date share price return of 1.51% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of 15.5% decline.
